Model Risk Signals (Observed & Inferred)

Categorized exposure, bias, and proxy indicators

Protected Attribute Exposure Signals

0

  • Scanning...
Confidence: High (Observed Input)

Proxy & Inferred Attribute Signals

0

Features capable of inferring protected attributes via correlation.

  • Scanning...
Confidence: Medium (Inferred Correlation)

Input Sensitivity & Bias Signals

0

Variables known to skew outcomes or introduce socioeconomic bias.

  • Scanning...
Confidence: High (Observed Input)

Outcome Disparity Signals

0

Performance disparities across protected demographic segments.

Confidence: Pending (Runtime Evaluation)
